creator: henry.hu.sh@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 165791
patch to install libns

Currently, ns plugin is built but not installed by synergy.
It is required for enabling crypto.

With the attached patch, we can start synergy with
 synergys --enable-crypto --plugin-dir /usr/local/lib/synergy
to have the ns plugin loaded and crypto enabled.
(Key pair must be created beforehand according to https://wiki.archlinux.org/index.php/synergy#Arch_Linux_2)

It depends on openssl which is included in the base system, but a clear dependency may be required.
